content_preview.title: PGL Bucharest 2026 Opens With FaZe Clan Forfeit and Reload Overhaul as 16 Teams Chase $625,000 and Major Qualification Points
content_preview.summary: The CS2 Swiss-format tournament in Bucharest kicked off on April 4 with FaZe Clan forfeiting their opening match to prioritize IEM Cologne Major qualification at a rival LAN, while a recent reload mechanic overhaul reshapes competitive strategy across the field.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

PGL Bucharest 2026, a $625,000 Counter-Strike 2 tournament, began its Swiss-format group stage on April 4 with 16 teams competing at PGL Studio in Bucharest, Romania. The opening day delivered an immediate talking point when [FaZe Clan forfeited their Round 1 match against EYEBALLERS](https://liquipedia.net/counterstrike/PGL/2026/Bucharest) to attend the concurrent HLC Belgrade PRO event, a last-ditch effort to earn enough Valve Ranking System points for an IEM Cologne Major berth. ...

editor_notes.source_verification: Liquipedia: verified — 16 teams, $625K prize pool, Swiss format, FaZe forfeit, April 4-11 dates confirmed. Esports.gg and PC Gamer provide supplementary detail.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Tournament facts verified against Liquipedia, the authoritative CS2 esports source.
editor_notes.originality: Fresh topic — no prior PGL Bucharest coverage.
